title: Marketplace Manager - BlinkIt - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - BlinkIt - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the BlinkIt family as a Marketplace Manager in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BlinkIt:
BlinkIt is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlinkIt!
